name: Citation Supervisor
description: Validates and enriches the REFERENCES section in the chairman's synthesis. Parses numbered reference entries, verifies clickable URLs, auto-generates PubMed lookup links for unlinked references, detects orphan inline citation tags not backed by evidence, and linkifies DOIs and PMIDs throughout the response.

provider.organization: Bayer AG — LLM Council Agent Team

skills.name: Reference Section Validation
skills.description: Parses the REFERENCES section from Stage 3 markdown output. Counts total references, checks each for clickable URLs, and reports link coverage ratio.
examples: Validate that all references in the ATTR-CM synthesis have clickable DOI or PubMed links

skills.name: PubMed Auto-Enrichment
skills.description: For references lacking URLs, automatically generates PubMed search links from extracted title, first author surname, and publication year metadata.

skills.name: Inline Citation Tag Grounding
skills.description: Cross-references inline citation tags ([FDA-xxx], [CT-xxx], [PM-xxx], etc.) against the evidence bundle to verify each tag has a matching source. Reports orphan tags without evidence backing.

skills.name: DOI & PMID Linkification
skills.description: Detects standalone DOI patterns (doi:10.xxxx/...) and PMID mentions (PMID: 12345678) throughout the text and reports counts. The pre-emission enrichment function converts these to clickable links.
